title: ASIYUHY Green Balloons 100 Pack 12 Inch Matte Green Latex Balloons for Christmas Day Wild Safari Birthday Party Wedding Baby Shower Decoration
features: 【ASIYUHY Green Balloons 12 Inch】The package includes 100 pack thicken green latex balloons with 2 rolls of ribbon(65FT), Enough quantity can meet your daily life, festival or party decoration needs.
【Safe and High Quality】These green party balloons are made of premium latex material which is durable, durable and no stange smell, safe to be used for both kids and adults.

【Perfect for any Occasion】Green is the color of nature, reminiscent of health, life and hope. Green balloons are the perfect decoration for various occasions such as birthday parties, christmas decoration, gender reveals, Children's Day, jungle parties, safari park parties, tropical theme parties, etc.

【Support Helium & Air】matte green balloons can be filled with helium to float or fill with air to attach to any surface, It is recommended to use a balloon pump to inflate, You can have these perfect decorations in just a few minutes!

【ATTENTION & WARNING】Avoid direct sunlight, and keep away from sharp objects and excessive friction, To prevent the balloons from popping, the max diameter of the balloon is 12 inches when fully inflated, don't overfill.
